attributes.action: Vote of no confidence in UK Government
attributes.additional_details:
The petitioners call for the appropriate constitutional steps to be considered and seeking a renewed democratic mandate through an early "snap"  general election.
The current government is not fit for purpose, and the British people should be given the opportunity to determine what is in the best interests of the country.
attributes.background: This petition sets out concerns about the current performance of the government and its ability to fulfil its responsibilities effectively. The signatories believe that recent actions and decisions have raised questions about its capacity to govern in a manner that best serves the public interest.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
